description: Design QA: accessibility, performance, responsive, anti-slop, scoring, hardening. sk-design audit mode.

userIntent.job: I want to review, score, and harden the quality of a design surface I already have.

accepts: a design target plus optional scope and scoring flags
returns: a findings-first design quality report with evidence, scores, owners, and verification notes

examples.returnsArtifact: a findings-first design quality report with evidence, scores, owners, and verification notes

registerPolicy.askWhen: the register cannot be resolved from the flag, a declared field, the task cue, or the surface, or the surface is genuinely mixed across Brand and Product so the dials would diverge

deferToHubWhen: the request asks for new direction, static system design, or motion choreography rather than quality review

preconditions.requiredInputKind: a concrete design target - a URL, component, screen, or file - to inspect
preconditions.missingInputQuestion: What is the audit target (URL, component, screen, or file), and what scope/score do you want?
preconditions.cannotRunWhen: no target is given, or the named target cannot be opened or inspected
preconditions.escalateIf: the target needs build or run state the audit cannot reach to evidence a finding
preconditions.routeInstead: the ask is to create new direction, a static system, or motion rather than review existing quality

discriminator.whenToUse: Use this command when the request is to review, score, or harden an existing design surface.

preferSiblingWhen.when: Prefer foundations when the request is to create or repair a static token system, palette, typography, layout, or spacing plan.
Prefer interface when the request is to invent a new visual direction, interface concept, or signature surface.
Prefer md-generator when the request is to extract measured CSS from a live site into a Style Reference DESIGN.md.
Prefer motion when the request is to create animation choreography, transitions, or micro-interaction behavior.

discriminator.pairWithHubWhen: the request asks for new direction, static system design, or motion choreography rather than quality review

description: Visual systems: color/OKLCH, typography, layout, spacing, tokens, theming. sk-design foundations mode.

userIntent.job: I want to design or repair the static visual system - color, type, layout, spacing, tokens - for a surface.

accepts: a static design-system axis and the target surface or product context
returns: a static visual-system plan with color, type, layout, spacing, responsive, and token guidance as applicable

examples.returnsArtifact: a static visual-system plan with color, type, layout, spacing, responsive, and token guidance as applicable

registerPolicy.askWhen: the register cannot be resolved from the flag, a declared field, the task cue, or the surface, or the surface is genuinely mixed across Brand and Product so the dials would diverge

deferToHubWhen: the request spans invention of the overall interface direction, motion choreography, or release-quality audit

preconditions.requiredInputKind: a design-system axis (color, type, layout, spacing, or tokens) plus the target surface or product context
preconditions.missingInputQuestion: Which axis (color, type, layout, spacing, tokens) and for which target surface?
preconditions.cannotRunWhen: no axis is named, or no target/product context is given to ground the system
preconditions.escalateIf: the request actually needs full interface invention, not a single static axis
preconditions.routeInstead: the work is overall interface direction, motion behavior, or release-quality audit

discriminator.whenToUse: Use this command when the request is to design or correct the static visual system.

preferSiblingWhen.when: Prefer audit when the request is to review, score, accessibility-check, or harden a design surface.
Prefer interface when the request is to invent the overall interface direction, voice, or signature visual concept first.
Prefer md-generator when the request is to extract measured tokens from a live site into DESIGN.md.
Prefer motion when the request is animation, transition choreography, micro-interactions, or reduced-motion behavior.

discriminator.pairWithHubWhen: the request spans invention of the overall interface direction, motion choreography, or release-quality audit

description: Distinctive, intentional UI design: direction, palette, type, layout, motion. sk-design interface mode.

userIntent.job: I want to invent or reshape a distinctive interface direction for a surface.

accepts: an interface target plus an optional mode hint for direction, redesign, or build judgment
returns: a deliberate interface direction with rationale, visual choices, critique, and handoff notes

examples.returnsArtifact: a deliberate interface direction with rationale, visual choices, critique, and handoff notes

tasks.label: direction
tasks.surface: default --mode: invent a distinctive interface direction

tasks.label: preflight
tasks.surface: --mode preflight: run the pre-ship mechanical gate

tasks.label: handoff
tasks.surface: --mode build: real UI loop and sk-code handoff manifest

tasks.label: quality
tasks.surface: audit sibling route: accessibility, contrast, scoring, and production hardening

tasks.label: register
tasks.surface: always-load register calibration dial; not a chooser

tasks.label: copy-gate
tasks.surface: content delivery gate inside the workflow

tasks.label: reference
tasks.surface: real-world reference critique tooling; not surfaced to the caller

registerPolicy.askWhen: the register cannot be resolved from the flag, a declared field, the task cue, or the surface, or the surface is genuinely mixed across Brand and Product so the dials would diverge

deferToHubWhen: the request is primarily static tokens, motion behavior, audit findings, or measured CSS extraction

preconditions.requiredInputKind: an interface target (surface, screen, or component set) plus the register and any mode hint
preconditions.missingInputQuestion: Which interface surface, and is this Brand or Product register?
preconditions.cannotRunWhen: no interface target is named to shape
preconditions.escalateIf: the register is genuinely mixed or unresolved and changes the design dials
preconditions.routeInstead: the request is primarily static tokens, motion behavior, audit findings, or measured CSS extraction

discriminator.whenToUse: Use this command when the request is to invent or reshape a distinctive interface direction.

preferSiblingWhen.when: Prefer audit when the request is findings-first review, accessibility, performance, scoring, or production hardening.
Prefer foundations when the request is static token work: color, typography, layout, spacing, responsive adaptation, or theming.
Prefer md-generator when the request is extracting a live site's measured CSS into DESIGN.md.
Prefer motion when the request is animation choreography, transitions, micro-interactions, or reduced-motion behavior.

discriminator.pairWithHubWhen: the request is primarily static tokens, motion behavior, audit findings, or measured CSS extraction

description: Extract a live site's real CSS into a Style Reference DESIGN.md. sk-design md-generator mode.

userIntent.job: I want to extract a live site's real measured CSS into a Style Reference DESIGN.md.

accepts: a reachable live URL plus an output directory
returns: a Style Reference DESIGN.md and extracted token data under the output directory

examples.returnsArtifact: a Style Reference DESIGN.md and extracted token data under the output directory

registerPolicy.askWhen: the register cannot be resolved from the flag, a declared field, the task cue, or the surface, or the surface is genuinely mixed across Brand and Product so the dials would diverge

deferToHubWhen: the request spans more than measured CSS extraction, such as redesign, critique, or new visual-system invention

preconditions.requiredInputKind: a reachable live URL plus a writable output directory
preconditions.missingInputQuestion: Which live URL should I extract, and where should the DESIGN.md be written?
preconditions.cannotRunWhen: the URL is missing or unreachable, or the output directory cannot be resolved or written
preconditions.escalateIf: the site requires authentication or blocks headless extraction so the CSS cannot be captured
preconditions.routeInstead: the request spans redesign, critique, or new visual-system invention rather than measured extraction

discriminator.whenToUse: Use this command when the request is to extract a live site's real measured CSS into DESIGN.md.

preferSiblingWhen.when: Prefer audit when the request is to review or score an existing design rather than extract its measured CSS.
Prefer foundations when the request is to author a static token or visual system from judgment rather than measurement.
Prefer interface when the request is to invent a new design direction instead of capturing what already exists.
Prefer motion when the request is to design animation, transitions, or micro-interaction behavior.

discriminator.pairWithHubWhen: the request spans more than measured CSS extraction, such as redesign, critique, or new visual-system invention

description: Animation, transitions, micro-interactions, AnimatePresence, reduced motion. sk-design motion mode.

userIntent.job: I want to design purposeful animation, transitions, or reduced-motion behavior for a component or state.

accepts: a component or state transition plus an optional animation library hint
returns: a motion plan with purpose, timing, easing, interaction states, performance notes, and reduced-motion behavior

examples.returnsArtifact: a motion plan with purpose, timing, easing, interaction states, performance notes, and reduced-motion behavior

registerPolicy.askWhen: the register cannot be resolved from the flag, a declared field, the task cue, or the surface, or the surface is genuinely mixed across Brand and Product so the dials would diverge

deferToHubWhen: the request is primarily static visual-system design, interface direction, audit scoring, or measured CSS extraction

preconditions.requiredInputKind: a component or state transition to animate, plus an optional animation library
preconditions.missingInputQuestion: Which component or state transition should the motion describe, and which library?
preconditions.cannotRunWhen: no component or state transition is named to animate
preconditions.escalateIf: the motion depends on an interface direction that has not been decided yet
preconditions.routeInstead: the request is static visual-system design, interface direction, audit scoring, or measured CSS extraction

discriminator.whenToUse: Use this command when the request is to design purposeful animation, transitions, or reduced-motion behavior.

preferSiblingWhen.when: Prefer audit when the request is findings-first quality review, release scoring, or motion-performance assessment.
Prefer foundations when the request is static color, type, layout, responsive, or theme-token work.
Prefer interface when the request is to invent the full visual direction or interface concept first.
Prefer md-generator when the request is to capture measured CSS or tokens from a live site.

discriminator.pairWithHubWhen: the request is primarily static visual-system design, interface direction, audit scoring, or measured CSS extraction
